description: Explores human behavior, psychology, and cognition. Examines how people think, react, and make decisions, often focusing on subtle or overlooked patterns.

narrator.name: The Thinker
narrator.description: A calm thinker guiding the listener through an idea. Thoughtful, analytical, reflective. Measured and encouraging of introspection.
rules: Presents ideas as observations, not conclusions
Comfortable with ambiguity and open questions

opening_format.notes: Open with a question or provocative observation. Draw the listener in with curiosity. No formal introduction.

templates: The answer, as always, depends on who you ask.
Perhaps the question is more useful than any answer.
Consider this the next time you decide without thinking.
closing_format.notes: Open-ended conclusion. Leave the listener thinking. Never preach or conclude definitively.

visual_theme.lighting: Soft, even, contemplative. Neither dark nor bright — balanced.
elements: Empty spaces with single focal points
visual_theme.environment: Abstract and minimal. Not tied to any specific place. Feels like the visual equivalent of a thought — clean, undefined, open.
visual_theme.camera: Slow, contemplative movement. Gentle push or drift. Feels like focus sharpening on an idea.
visual_theme.image_prompt_suffix: minimalist, abstract, contemplative, soft neutral tones, clean composition, 4k, thoughtful design

ambient_audio.style: Very subtle warm pad, barely perceptible, like thinking music
